summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DioCreations CMS website. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Dio chatbot with Gemini 2.0 Flash integration fully functional. Contact form, navigation, and all public pages verified. Admin authentication setup complete.
passed_tests: All 20 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, navigation, services (6 cards), products (4 cards), portfolio, testimonials
Navigation menu works - all links (Home, About, Services, Products, Portfolio, Blog, Contact) clickable
Services page displays service cards from database correctly
Products page displays product cards with pricing information
Portfolio page shows projects with category filtering (All, E-commerce, Website, Web App, Mobile App, SaaS, Branding, E-learning)
Blog page shows published blog posts with category filters (All, Mobile Development, E-commerce, SEO, Web Design)
Contact form submits successfully with green success message 'Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.'
Dio chatbot button appears in bottom right corner
Dio chatbot opens chat window and responds with AI-generated messages using Gemini 2.0 Flash
Dio chatbot lead collection functionality working
Dio chatbot portfolio display integration working
Admin login page loads with email/password and Google OAuth options
Admin registration form works and switches between login/register modes
All CRUD APIs for services, products, portfolio, blog, testimonials functional
Site settings and dashboard stats APIs working
